channel.title: Research Radar — Daily Briefing
channel.description: Daily ~6-minute audio briefing of the autonomy-systems research radar. Generated automatically; voice is OpenAI TTS.
channel.itunes:author: Prof. Liangkai Liu
channel.itunes:summary: Daily ~6-minute audio briefing of the autonomy-systems research radar.

item.title: Research Radar — Sat May 09: Focus on AI agent frameworks and datasets dominates today
item.description: Today's research highlights a surge in AI agent frameworks and datasets, particularly with the release of AgentTrove, a comprehensive collection of agentic interaction traces. This trend underscores the growing interest in multi-agent systems and their applications in real-time AI environments.
